list.sql: SELECT r.id, r.student_id, s.name AS student_name, r.month, r.quiz1, r.quiz2, r.quiz3, r.quiz4, r.exam20, r.exam30, r.interview, r.total_marks, r.grade FROM Results r LEFT JOIN Students s ON s.id = r.student_id ORDER BY r.id DESC

get.sql: SELECT id, student_id, month, quiz1, quiz2, quiz3, quiz4, exam20, exam30, interview, total_marks, grade FROM Results WHERE id = %s

insert.sql: INSERT INTO Results (student_id, month, quiz1, quiz2, quiz3, quiz4, exam20, exam30, interview, total_marks, grade) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)

update.sql: UPDATE Results SET student_id = %s, month = %s, quiz1 = %s, quiz2 = %s, quiz3 = %s, quiz4 = %s, exam20 = %s, exam30 = %s, interview = %s, total_marks = %s, grade = %s WHERE id = %s

students_select.sql: SELECT id, name FROM Students ORDER BY name
